title: Gisela Graham Miniature Rose Spray, Pale Pink
features: Unique faux flowers within your existing faux bouquet
Great way to refresh your interior for each season
Give you sense of beauty and a good mood in a day
Ideal for filling out a floral display
Perfect for any scenes, home, wedding, office, party and hotel
description: Gisela Graham Pale Pink Miniature Rose Spray is a great way to refresh your interior for each season without having to start over again each time. They can be brought back to life easily by smoothing out the petals and leaves. Give you a sense of beauty and a good mood in a day. Ideal for placing in a vase, filling of centrepieces or home wedding decoration.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎1 x Gisela Graham Miniature Rose Spray, Pale Pink
